title: Looking for Category Manager at FabHotels

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at FabHotels
jsonLd.description:
Join the FabHotels family as a Category Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FabHotels:
FabHotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabHotels!
